description: Catalog of available domains for layering on top of base rubrics. Each domain's extensions live in rubrics/domains/{id}/{level}-extension.json.

domains.name: Data & Reporting
domains.description: Stories that produce data products — dashboards, reports, tables, files, APIs serving analytics.

domains.name: Capital Markets
domains.description: Trading, settlement, securitization, and investor reporting workflows.

domains.name: Single Family Origination
domains.description: Loan acquisition, underwriting, and commitment workflows for the SF book.

domains.name: Multifamily Servicing
domains.description: Sub-servicer integration, asset management, and investor reporting for the MF book.

domains.name: Risk & Compliance
domains.description: Risk reporting, regulatory submissions, and internal control work.
